# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working
with code in this repository.

## What This Repo Is

Public Claude Code plugin marketplace (`langburd/claude-plugins`). Hosts
versioned plugin bundles — each bundle may carry skills, agents, commands,
and MCP config. Consumers install via:

```bash
claude plugin marketplace add langburd/claude-plugins
claude plugin install <plugin>@langburd
```

## Critical: Generated Files

**Do not hand-edit these files:**

- `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json` — regenerated by `sync.sh` from each
  bundle's `plugin.json`
- Root `README.md` plugin table (between `<!-- BEGIN PLUGIN TABLE -->` and
  `<!-- END PLUGIN TABLE -->` sentinels)

After any plugin edit, run `./scripts/sync.sh` to propagate changes.

## Workflow: Adding or Editing a Plugin

1. Edit skill content in `plugins/<name>/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`
2. Bump `version` in `plugins/<name>/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`
3. Run `./scripts/sync.sh` (regenerates marketplace.json + README table)
4. Commit — pre-commit hook runs `sync.sh` again as a safety net

## Plugin Structure

```text
plugins/<bundle-name>/
├── .claude-plugin/
│   └── plugin.json     # SOURCE OF TRUTH: name (kebab-case), version, description
├── skills/
│   └── <skill-name>/
│       └── SKILL.md    # frontmatter: name, description (both required)
├── agents/             # optional
├── commands/           # optional
├── .mcp.json           # optional
└── README.md
```

No `type` field in `plugin.json` — contents inferred from directories.

## SKILL.md Format

```markdown
---
name: my-skill
description: Use when <trigger> — <what it does>
---

# My Skill

Skill content here.
```

## `sync.sh` Commands

| Command | When to use |
| --- | --- |
| `./scripts/sync.sh` | After editing any plugin — regenerates in place |
| `./scripts/sync.sh --check` | Validate only, no writes — CI gate |

## Validation Rules (`sync.sh` enforces these)

- `plugin.json` must exist and be valid JSON with non-empty `name` and `version`
- `plugin.json` `name` must match its directory name
- `skills/` must exist with at least one `skills/*/SKILL.md`
- Each `SKILL.md` must have frontmatter with non-empty `name` and `description`

## Pre-Commit Hooks

Installed (`pre-commit install` already run). Every commit runs:

- JSON: `check-json` + `pretty-format-json` (2-space, no key sort)
- Bash: `shellcheck --severity=warning` + `shfmt -i 2 -ci -bn`
- Markdown: `markdownlint --fix` (config: `.markdownlint.json` — MD013/MD033/MD040/MD060 disabled)
- YAML: `check-yaml`
- Local `sync` hook: runs `sync.sh` (catches forgotten regeneration)

## CI

`.github/workflows/validate.yml` runs on PRs touching `plugins/**`,
`.claude-plugin/**`, `scripts/**`, `README.md`:

1. `sync.sh --check` — drift gate
2. `pre-commit run --all-files`

jq is preinstalled on `ubuntu-latest` — no install step needed.

## Version Bump

Only edit `version` in `plugin.json` — `sync.sh` propagates it everywhere:

```json
{ "name": "my-plugin", "version": "1.1.0", "description": "..." }
```

## End-to-End Install Test

Run before declaring a plugin done:

```bash
claude plugin marketplace add /absolute/path/to/claude-plugins
claude plugin install <bundle>@langburd
```
